subcodes.first_line: O loved ones of the All-Merciful throughout the lands! Every fire is seen to be extinguished save the Fire of the Love of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احباء الرحمن فی البلدان هر ناری مخمود مشاهده میشود مگر ناری که لحب الله
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @love of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
